scripts.dev: concurrently -k --names "api,loc,front" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green" "yarn workspace @soliguide/api watch" "yarn workspace @soliguide/location-api watch" "yarn workspace @soliguide/frontend start"
scripts.dev:es: concurrently -k --names "api,loc,front-es" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green" "yarn workspace @soliguide/api watch" "yarn workspace @soliguide/location-api watch" "yarn workspace @soliguide/frontend start:es"
scripts.dev:ad: concurrently -k --names "api,loc,front-ad" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green" "yarn workspace @soliguide/api watch" "yarn workspace @soliguide/location-api watch" "yarn workspace @soliguide/frontend start:ad"
